description_long: This object is an abstract, highly stylized representation of a human adult pedestrian, featuring elongated and angular limbs with sharp, geometric forms. The figure is constructed from a combination of metallic and glass-like materials, giving it a futuristic and sculptural appearance. The body is composed of intersecting planes and rods, with a prominent, faceted torso and limbs that taper to points. The head is minimally defined, blending into the upper structure without clear facial features. The overall form is dynamic, suggesting movement or a walking posture, with one leg extended forward and the arms positioned asymmetrically. The surfaces are highly reflective, with a mix of coppery and dark metallic tones, contributing to a sleek, modern aesthetic.
description: A futuristic, angular human figure with elongated limbs and reflective metallic surfaces, posed in a dynamic walking stance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the angular, intersecting limbs and the faceted torso, with the extended leg and arm visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the sharp, geometric planes of the body and the reflective coppery surfaces.
description_view_2: This angle shows the dynamic posture, with the forward leg and the asymmetrical positioning of the arms more apparent.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the elongated back and the tapering limbs, as well as the overall sleek, metallic finish.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic sculptural bodysuit with angular, geometric panels
